scripts.build: tsc && vite build && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp -r node_modules/@ionic/core/dist/ionic/svg dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r node_modules/@ionic/core/dist/ionic/svg dist/assets/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -n node_modules/@ionic/core/dist/ionic/*.js dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -n node_modules/@ionic/core/dist/ionic/*.js dist/assets/ 2>/dev/null || true
